channel.title: 🏡 Thi Thao NGUYEN
channel.description: Recent content on 🏡 Thi Thao NGUYEN

item.title: P-Hacking
item.description: The smaller the p-value, the more evidence there is to reject H0. P-value is the probability of witnessing an event at least as extreme as our result. Reduce p-value if you want to be extra-sure that you have good evidence ot reject H0. p-hacking collected a bunch of data tested a bunch of different things and looked for p-values <0.05 claimed strong evidence for the things that have p-values <0.
